title: thymus polytrichus subsp. vallicola
intro: Thymus polytrichus subsp. vallicola, also known as Valerian Thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus polytrichus plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thymus polytrichus subsp. vallicola include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Thymus polytrichus subsp. vallicola can be found in teas, essential oils, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
